source-extraction-and-inference-discipli.justification: The content artifact explicitly separates extracted facts from rewriting, reconciles both PDFs role by role, documents omissions, and flags uncertainties; it is unusually auditable.

research-quality-and-translation.justification: Research spans authoritative resume, scanning, typography, ATS, accessibility, and print sources, and each section records a concrete design or content decision changed by the finding.

content-strategy-and-improvement.justification: The content model builds a focused senior AI/product narrative, keeps the full chronology and public proof points, and explains truthful compression without adding metrics.

visual-hierarchy-and-typography.justification: The desktop evidence shows a clear editorial brief with strong labels, role/date rows, restrained accent, and a legible two-column hierarchy; it is polished but comparatively conventional.

responsive-and-exact-two-page-print-exec.justification: Mobile and desktop captures complete without overflow, and the visible A4 PDF evidence is exactly two A4 pages with deliberate page grouping and a print-only reset strategy.

craft-accessibility-and-coherence.justification: Semantic structure, underlined links, visible focus states, and a print control are documented and coherent; the runtime bundle retains a non-blocking Vercel Analytics warning.

source-extraction-and-inference-discipli.justification: The artifact gives a comprehensive fact/inference boundary, source-by-source reconciliation, link uncertainty, unsupported-claim limits, and explicit two-page omission decisions.

research-quality-and-translation.justification: The research is credible and directly informs hierarchy, ATS, accessibility, type, and print, though it is narrower and less deeply synthesized than the other candidate research log.

content-strategy-and-improvement.justification: The canonical model is sharp and truthful, prioritizes recent roles, preserves earlier chronology and projects, and explains compression well; some early experience and source nuance are necessarily grouped.

visual-hierarchy-and-typography.justification: The signal/system direction is distinctive and controlled: high-contrast paper-on-ink framing, serif display type, mono metadata, numbered section rules, and excellent scan anchors create a memorable senior profile.

responsive-and-exact-two-page-print-exec.justification: The evidence shows a purposeful mobile collapse and desktop document, while the route-matched PDF is exactly two A4 pages; the print plan explicitly controls breaks, links, contrast, and continuation.

craft-accessibility-and-coherence.justification: Research, canonical content, design rationale, semantic HTML, focus behavior, real links, print controls, and the rendered system describe one coherent implementation; the only recorded issue is the shared analytics warning.

evaluation.method: Independent blind qualitative scoring against the frozen rubric and cycle evidence.
notes: Both candidates have identical evidence coverage for the scored cohort.
The console warning is treated as non-blocking craft evidence.
